desc: Command: Places drainage annotation notes on pipes in the current plan view.
summary: Command: Places drainage annotation notes on pipes in the current plan view. Collects all pipes in view, calculates system bounds via GetDrainageContext.CalculateDrainageSystemBounds, then delegates note creation to GetDrainageNotes.PlaceNotesOnDrainage. Related: DrainageDesignOrchestrator for the full design-and-annotate workflow.
usecase: User has placed drainage pipes and wants to annotate them with pipe-size notes. User wants to add notes after running DesignDrainageSystemCommand. User wants to re-annotate an existing drainage layout.
notfor: Not for placing pipes (use PlaceSVPCommand or DesignDrainageSystemCommand). Not for placing fixture notes (handled by GetFixtureNotes within the orchestrator).
precondition: Active document must be open. User must be in a plan view. At least one drainage pipe must exist in the current view.
postcondition: Text notes are placed next to drainage pipes showing size and slope. Note positions are calculated relative to the drainage system bounding region.

outputs.name: PipeCount
outputs.description: Number of drainage pipes found in view

preprompts: Placing drainage notes on your pipes...
Annotating drainage system in current view...
Adding pipe size and slope notes...
